changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Assign AHRI demo cold storage rooms to owning test sections for department-scoped access.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE storage_room SET department_test_section_id = CASE code WHEN 'CSR-BACT' THEN 168 WHEN 'CSR-BIOA' THEN 174 WHEN 'CSR-BIOE' THEN 175 WHEN 'CSR-BIOREP' THEN 182 WHEN 'CSR-GEN' THEN 172 WHEN 'CSR-IMM' THEN 59 WHEN 'CSR-MNTD' THEN 177 WHEN 'CSR-MED' THEN 181 WHEN 'CSR-PATH' THEN 176 WHEN 'CSR-PHARM' THEN 178 WHEN 'CSR-TMM' THEN 173 WHEN 'CSR-TB' THEN 180 WHEN 'CSR-VIR' THEN 179 ELSE department_test_section_id END WHERE code IN ( 'CSR-BACT', 'CSR-BIOA', 'CSR-BIOE', 'CSR-BIOREP', 'CSR-GEN', 'CSR-IMM', 'CSR-MNTD', 'CSR-MED', 'CSR-PATH', 'CSR-PHARM', 'CSR-TMM', 'CSR-TB', 'CSR-VIR' );
